What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Grey Hulk (2027) - Matt Damon, Anthony Hopkins, Angelina Jolie, Keanu Reeves | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#GreyHulk #MattDamon #AnthonyHopkins #AngelinaJolie #KeanuReeves #Kluh

Jack Morrow — a former combat medic wrongfully convicted of treason and buried in a black-site prison called Ashworth Federal Penitentiary — has spent six years rotting in a concrete cell with no trial, no appeal, and no hope, until a shadowy government operative named Director Elias Hargrove arrives with an offer: survive a classified experimental serum injection under a program called Project Goliath, and walk out a free man with a full pardon and a new identity. Desperate and with nothing left to lose, Morrow signs the document and is transported to Site Prometheus — a massive underground research facility hidden beneath the Utah salt flats — where lead geneticist Dr. Lena Vasik injects him with a dark silvery-green gamma serum that has already killed thirty-one previous test subjects, but this time something different happens: Morrow doesn't die — his veins turn black, his skin shifts to dark stone-grey, his hair falls away leaving a bald skull mapped with pulsing veins, and he transforms into something the military never imagined — the Grey Hulk, the first successful survivor of Project Goliath, stronger and smarter than anything they've ever created. But when Morrow discovers that the freedom he was promised was a lie — that the documents he signed were consent-to-terminate forms and every test subject was scheduled for disposal regardless of survival — he makes a decision: he's not their weapon, he's not their experiment, and he's not dying in this facility, igniting a brutal breakout through the underground corridors of Site Prometheus, a jungle warfare campaign against an entire military task force sent to hunt him down, and a final desperate airstrike that fails to stop something that was never meant to be stopped. With the help of Dr. Vasik — who risks everything to expose the truth about Section 9's crimes — Grey Hulk escapes into the wilderness, but Hargrove is already planning Phase 2 with two hundred new subjects, and deep in the wreckage of the destroyed facility, something else is waking up — Roman Volkov, the man Grey Hulk left for dead, is transforming into something darker, something more savage, something called KLUH.
Matt Damon as Jack Morrow / Grey Hulk
Anthony Hopkins as Director Elias Hargrove
Angelina Jolie as Dr. Lena Vasik
Keanu Reeves as Roman Volkov / Kluh
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

snippet.title: KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS Official Trailer
snippet.description:
KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS in cinemas worldwide with limited screenings from August 12. 
tickets now on sale at http://katseyewildheartsfilm.com/

Two-time GRAMMY®-nominated global girl group KATSEYE is coming to cinemas worldwide with a special theatrical release ahead of their third EP, WILD.

KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is a captivating journey into the group's bold new era while celebrating the fans who helped make it possible. Featuring never-before-seen footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews from the group members, the film explores the powerful bond between KATSEYE and their global fandom. A love letter to the EYEKONS who helped build this movement, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS reveals why this group's story is only just beginning.

From the intense pressure of Dream Academy to chart-topping viral success, audiences experience the highs, setbacks, sacrifices, and breakthrough moments that transformed KATSEYE on their path to global pop stardom. Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force.

From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

snippet.title: I PLAY ROCKY | Official Trailer HD
snippet.description:
Directed by: Peter Farrelly
Starring: Anthony Ippolito, Matt Dillon, AnnaSophia Robb, P.J. Byrne, Toby Kebbell, Tracy Letts, Jay Duplass and Kiki Seto

The film is an electrifying true story about an unknown actor with an unshakable belief that he wasn't just meant to write Rocky – he was meant to be Rocky Balboa. Told 'no' at every turn, Sylvester Stallone bets everything on himself, holding the line on playing the lead against seemingly impossible odds. The result is the ultimate underdog story behind the ultimate underdog movie.
